name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Mr. Trump is not the problem ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**Take Iraq**. Justified as a preventive war, it embroiled us in its expanding conflict into Syria, Africa and beyond as it created the more brutal terror of ISIS. **Democrats and Republicans alike who voted for that war did not understand either the complexities of the world, or that militaries can stop a problem, but they can never fix a problem.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9355130/92180311/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc0YjMwZi00MmM3LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ALgWeWyLGfWs8yPIN8JDRBHeQHfj04CbmbZBswsA1o=&refcode=em082519p1)
Then **the same political leaders dismantled the safeguards of the one place in America where a wall is definitely needed — to keep greed out, and accountability in -- but the politicians tore that wall down also** , and so the inaptly named Wall Street was left unfettered to shatter our economy and with it, millions of Americans’ lives, in the Great Recession.
**And no one, not one political leader, has ever answered for themselves to be accountable for the carnage of either that great recession ... or that tragic war**. But **450 of those Senators and congressmen have become lobbyists** ... as their revenue increased 400% during the last twenty years — while the income of working families has been flat-lined. I know, I received but**turned down such offers**.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9355131/92180312/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc0YjMwZi00MmM3LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ALgWeWyLGfWs8yPIN8JDRBHeQHfj04CbmbZBswsA1o=&refcode=em082519p2)
**It is _this_ unaccountable leadership that is responsible for the lack of trust in America today ... and why Mr. Trump is not the problem; he is the symptom of the problem** that has undermined our sense of national unity, of whom we are and what we stand for **...** a system that people see as not fair and accountable to them.
**We have no choice ... it is not enough just to win this Presidential election, we must also heal our nation’s soul with a leader who is trusted by the people because he is willing to be accountable to them -- above self, above party, above any special interest ... no matter the cost to him.**
**_This is the singular reason I am running_ \-- we cannot meet the defining challenges of our time without an America that is united under such a President.**
**If you want a President that is accountable only to the American people, please contribute and support me. Thank you!**
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9355132/92180313/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc0YjMwZi00MmM3LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ALgWeWyLGfWs8yPIN8JDRBHeQHfj04CbmbZBswsA1o=&refcode=em082519button)
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9355133/92180314/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODc0YjMwZi00MmM3LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ALgWeWyLGfWs8yPIN8JDRBHeQHfj04CbmbZBswsA1o=)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

You don’t start organizations and run for President if you’re not.

| | | |
---
| Friend --

| Automation has already destroyed millions of American jobs and will destroy a million more. And there’s nothing we can do to stop it. It’s an existential threat.

**Having said that -- I am an optimist. You don’t start organizations and run for President if you’re not.**

We’ve got problems, there’s no denying that. But there are solutions and they definitely don’t include building a wall, bringing back old jobs, or making anything great again.

We have to turn the clock forward.

We have to accelerate our economy and society as fast as possible. We have to evolve in the way we see work and value. We can arrest the decline of our civilization, but only if we take bold action and we take it fast.

I’m not holed up in my basement waiting for the waters or the economy to overtake me and my family. **I’ve got two young boys and I’ll be damned if I just rest while the future I see coming up just overtakes us all.**

[But I can’t do it alone. I need you on my team and I need your support. clean_body: You don’t start organizations and run for President if you’re not. | | | | | Friend -- | Automation has already destroyed millions of American jobs and will destroy a million more. And there’s nothing we can do to stop it. It’s an existential threat. Having said that -- I am an optimist. You don’t start organizations and run for President if you’re not. We’ve got problems, there’s no denying that. But there are solutions and they definitely don’t include building a wall, bringing back old jobs, or making anything great again. We have to turn the clock forward. We have to accelerate our economy and society as fast as possible. We have to evolve in the way we see work and value. We can arrest the decline of our civilization, but only if we take bold action and we take it fast. I’m not holed up in my basement waiting for the waters or the economy to overtake me and my family. Now that the campaign's picking up steam, Tim's been hitting different podcasts and shows to amplify his message and make sure Americans really understand what this movement is all about.

And it's working, folks! After talking to our friends at Slate and NPR last week, our campaign received an influx of calls, emails, and inquiries from Americans across the country asking how they can get involved.

Here are some quotes that people are talking about:

**" My agenda gets us out of the left and right conundrum that we're in right now, and gets us into the new and better."

| | Derek,

We've got an important update on the race to share with you. Mark's opponent, Scott Taylor, recently picked up two big endorsements from former Congressman Dave Brat (VA-07) and former Congresswoman Barbara Comstock (VA-10).

But last November, voters sent a clear message that they want independent voices like those of Abigail Spanberger, Jennifer Wexton, and Elaine Luria fighting for Virginia in the House of Representatives.

Mark's opponent, Scott Taylor, recently picked up two big endorsements from former Congressman Dave Brat (VA-07) and former Congre | | | Derek, We've got an important update on the race to share with you. Mark's opponent, Scott Taylor, recently picked up two big endorsements from former Congressman Dave Brat (VA-07) and former Congresswoman Barbara Comstock (VA-10). When they were in Congress, Taylor and his new endorsers all had major pro-Trump voting records -- Taylor himself voted with Trump 98% of the time. But last November, voters sent a clear message that they want independent voices like those of Abigail Spanberger, Jennifer Wexton, and Elaine Luria fighting for Virginia in the House of Representatives. Now that Scott Taylor is running to unseat Senator Warner, he's trying everything he can to bring his pro-Trump voting record back to Congress. We need your help to make sure that doesn't happen. Will you make a contribution to help keep Mark in the Senate, fighting for Virginia? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Virginians have made it clear they want leaders who can hold the President accountable, protect healthcare for Virginians with pre-existing conditions, and secure our elections from foreign interference. "" Thanks for standing with Mark, Team Warner | ** ""** | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

I didn't start off as a frontrunner in this race -- but I wasn't born a frontrunner.

I'm used to being underestimated as _**just**_**** the guy from an immigrant family.

I'm used to being counted out as _**just**_**** the Hispanic candidate.

I'm used to being dismissed as _**just**_**** the kid raised by a single mom.

But you believed in me. You had my back. And you just helped me make the next debate and prove them all wrong.

You have no idea how much that means to me.

[_**I want to lift you up the same way you 've done for me. I'm going to spend every second on that debate stage fighting for you. So I'm personally asking: Will you take my 10-second survey before midnight and share the issues that matter most to you? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce8e/3eb3e2fc/5feae2f0/744b8413/1232540122/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190825_em_pet_b1_castro_all")

-Julian

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

name: Jen O'Malley Dillon
subject: Reporting back on the survey results:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We downloaded the survey results from a few days ago. Most of you wanted us to focus our budget on two things...
#
I just wanted to check back in and say thank you for sharing your thoughts on the campaign with me.
We downloaded the [survey](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190825/?source=ema20190825-51115&t=1&akid=51115%2E444211%2EI7TZMi) results, which I just finished reviewing, and found them to be incredibly valuable. Most of you wanted us to focus our budget on hiring staff in key states and running TV or radio ads to get the word out.
We hear you and we’re definitely going to follow that lead, although we can’t promise exactly when we’ll start our advertising. But I’m looking at adjusting our budget as much as possible to that effect. I wish it weren’t so important, but how much we raise this month will determine in large part what we can spend on those priorities. We’re still a bit behind on our goal headed into the last week of August. So I have to ask...
[Can you make a $3 contribution towards hiring staff on the ground and running our first advertisements? Every dollar helps us out as we look at ways to maximize this budget.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/29986?refcode=ema20190825-51115&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=51115%2E444211%2EI7TZMi)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/29986?refcode=ema20190825-51115&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=51115%2E444211%2EI7TZMi)**
By the way, you can still add to the survey by [clicking here](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190825/?source=ema20190825-51115&t=22&akid=51115%2E444211%2EI7TZMi). We’re still going through a lot of the open text box answers and talking with the team about them. Many of you wrote in with incredibly smart ideas, and I’m grateful for your advice.
Thanks for believing in this campaign,
**Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=51115%2E444211%2EI7TZMi). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This time of year:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're fighting for big, structural change to build a brighter future for every kid, every student, and everyone looking for a second chance. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285291fd/45c30650/1206aa6a0/6684a6eb/1944361610/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Back-to-school season has been a big deal in my life -- that's just how it is when you're a teacher.

At the same time I'd send my own kids off with backpacks and fresh supplies, I'd get ready to welcome new faces to my classroom.

For decades, no matter whether I was teaching contracts or bankruptcy law, it felt like a victory every time I saw the _click!_ as a student grasped a really hard idea.

Over the years, I've come to see every back-to-school season as a fresh start and a second chance.

My first second chance came after I dropped out of college at 19 to get married. It came in the form of the University of Houston, a commuter college that cost just $50 a semester. I got my degree and landed my first teaching job, at a public school.

But it wasn't all smooth sailing after that. With baby on hip, I went back to school at Rutgers Law. And later when I was ready to quit teaching law because I couldn't find good childcare, my Aunt Bee gave me the help I needed to stay in the classroom.

Each time I stepped back on campus, my world got a little bigger and the possibilities open to me got a little wider. That's what this time of year is all about. And that's why I'm in this fight for our young people's futures.

At town halls, I still look into people's faces in the audience to see that _click!_ of someone realizing we have a plan that will actually work -- to make sure everyone has a fighting chance to get the education they need, without getting crushed by debt. It's why we're barnstorming the country to make the case for Universal Child Care, student loan debt cancellation, free two-year and four-year public college and technical school, and more.

And at a campaign stop in New York, a public school teacher named Liat had a terrific idea that we've turned into a formal pledge: In a Warren administration, our Secretary of Education will be a former public school teacher. They'll be someone who's gotten ready to welcome kids back into the classroom, who's probably had to pay for the supplies that their students need out of their own pocket, and who knows in their bones why we need to invest in public education.

**This year, I won't be in the classroom getting ready for the new school year. But you and I are still getting in gear for something powerfully important.**

**[We're fighting for big, structural change to build a brighter future for every kid, every student, and everyone looking for a second chance. But it's only possible if we keep growing our grassroots movement. As we get ready for a packed schedule and a busy fall, will you chip in for the first time to help take this campaign to the next level?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285291fd/45c30650/1206aa6a0/6684a6ea/1944361610/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk2NUZfRUdSX0JJT19FXzIwMTkwODI1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI65F_EGR_BIO_E_20190825_V1S1_P")**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Can you add your name to my plan that puts workers first?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| team, for decades, incomes for most Americans have stagnated, while the costs of living have continued to rise.

Everywhere I go I hear from people who are working incredibly hard, but still can't afford a good middle-class life.

Donald Trump talks a lot about helping workers, but from his tax cuts to his reckless trade war to his continued effort to rip health care from millions, he's all empty promises. Now to make matters worse, he's scrambling as a weakening economy looms.

[That's why I unveiled a plan to put workers first and ensure hard work is rewarded with a living wage and a good middle-class life.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac61/134673f2/c167d7a/69964611/93630536/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/reward-hard-work?source=EM_PET_B1_082519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[Please read about it below and add your name to say you support our "Plan to Reward Hard Work."](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac61/134673f2/c167d7a/69964611/93630536/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/reward-hard-work?source=EM_PET_B1_082519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[The plan has three components:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac61/134673f2/c167d7a/69964611/93630536/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/reward-hard-work?source=EM_PET_B1_082519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[INVEST IN WORKERS](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac61/134673f2/c167d7a/69964611/93630536/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/reward-hard-work?source=EM_PET_B1_082519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
The plan will make a historic $500 billion investment in American workers over the next ten years, including in high-quality training like registered apprenticeships. The plan will coordinate these investments across regional economies to connect workers' skills with local demand. It will support the 70% of Americans who do not have a four-year degree, but are seeking to gain the skills and job opportunities they need to succeed in the economy.

[EMPOWER WORKERS](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac61/134673f2/c167d7a/69964611/93630536/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/reward-hard-work?source=EM_PET_B1_082519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
The plan will drive economic security for middle-class Americans and people working to get into the middle class through expanding the Child Tax Credit and Earned Income Tax Credit, enacting paid family and medical leave, and raising the minimum wage. It also will empower workers by cracking down on abuses by big corporations and supporting collective bargaining.

[PREVENT AND RESPOND TO ECONOMIC EMERGENCIES](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac61/134673f2/c167d7a/69964611/93630536/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/reward-hard-work?source=EM_PET_B1_082519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
The plan will work to prevent recessions - which hurt people living paycheck to paycheck the most - and to respond aggressively to get the economy going again when they do occur.

It's time we put workers first. Together, we'll do just that.

Will you stand with us today and say you support the "Plan to Reward Hard Work"?

[Add your name if you agree we must pass this plan and put workers first.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac61/134673f2/c167d7a/69964611/93630536/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/reward-hard-work?source=EM_PET_B1_082519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Mitch McConnell is about to return from his month-long vacation.

Will you take a second to respond to the poll? >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d8/18e32a7f/55fd2fa3/7bd16c9f/2767925000/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20190825_em_pet_b1_mapvbrl_all_rs")

After blocking every single piece of critical legislation from our Democratic House...

I have never been more certain of anything:

**Mitch McConnell is the single worst Senate Majority Leader in modern history. And I want him to know it.**

[_**Will you take my McConnell Approval Poll before midnight? Ben Ray

On Friday, Senator Shaheen reached out because Donald Trump personally recruited his former campaign manager, Corey Lewandowski, to run for her New Hampshire Senate seat.
Everyone from FiveThirtyEight to CBS is saying that her race will decide Senate control, and her team had a rare match opportunity in effect. This meant that every dollar given would go twice as far toward winning in New Hampshire and taking back a Democratic Senate.
Unfortunately, we fell short of what we told Jeanne we'd help her raise. [**We 're desperately trying to make up ground today and could really use your help. Will you please give $3 or as much as you can to help protect New Hampshire's other Democratic Senate seat from Donald Trump and Corey Lewandowski?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3a3/2a380d31/3c21304f/f0c357/1381301833/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA4MjVfTVdINENKUy1raWNrX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190825_MWH4CJS-kick_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

Maggie Hassan's campaign staff

_Sender: Jeanne Shaheen
Sent To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Date: August 23, 2019_
I don't know where else to turn right now, everyone, so Maggie said that I could reach out.
Just over a week ago, Donald Trump personally recruited his former campaign manager Corey Lewandowski to run for this seat at his campaign rally in New Hampshire, and now we have until midnight tonight to raise the $50,000 we need to fight back. But we're still way short, and our match is about to expire.
Everyone from FiveThirtyEight to CBS is saying that our race in New Hampshire will decide Senate control. But The Washington Post just named this seat one of the most likely to flip -- so if we want to take back the Senate, we have to take full advantage of this match opportunity right now.
Mitch McConnell's right-wing group has already launched their first round of attack ads against us -- and as of today, GOP outside groups are spending more against us than all the other in-cycle Democratic senators combined. **They know that Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose here -- but missing this rapid-response goal would mean losing in New Hampshire.**
**With Republicans going all in on this race and just one day left until our match expires, every dollar could be the difference between a Republican and a Democratic Senate** :
[**Please, I 'm counting on you to give $3 before our match deadline at midnight: Every dollar will go twice as far toward winning in New Hampshire so we can take back the Senate for Democrats!**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3a3/2a380d31/3c21304f/f0c357/1381301833/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA4MjVfTVdINENKUy1raWNrX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190825_MWH4CJS-kick_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thanks so much,
Jeanne

| Friend, when it came to announcing this campaign for Senate, John wanted to kick things off in a way that felt true to him--and he sank the shot.

We want to make sure people all over the state know what's at stake in this race, and why Hick isn't done fighting for Colorado.

[**_Will you share the video that launched this campaign on Facebook? (And be sure to tell people to watch to the end.)_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e9/691c9bd/6e4bb087/11a4459a/1605949602/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/videos/1280948282086411/")

That's why, as John says, now isn't the time for him to walk away from the table. Topher

name: Chirlane McCray, de Blasio 2020
subject: Starting in one hour Re: Bill's town hall forum live on CNN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
The one thing I know for sure that CNN's national audience is going to see tonight:
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ee8/1630b3eb/51702b79/5f54bfd6/3439848498/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=711_org_em_fr")
Friend,
Bill has focused all weekend on preparing for tonight's live CNN Town Hall at 7:00 p.m. ET. Are you planning to tune in?
I don't know about you, but our family and friends can't wait to see what Bill will have the opportunity to talk about tonight. Will we hear about his plan for a **21st Century Workers Bill of Rights**? Will we hear about the most aggressive **tax on extreme wealth** of any candidate in the presidential race? Or will we hear about his extensive track record of **progressive accomplishments** in New York City?
There's only one way to find out. It starts soon, so be sure to gather your friends and family members to watch with you.
**[To make sure this campaign has the resources to turn tonight's viewers into tomorrow's supporters, we're asking you to step up now. Contribute $1 and let's give Bill the boost he needs before the town hall starts.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ee8/1630b3eb/51702b79/5f54bfd6/3439848498/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=711_org_em_fr")**
After spending 27 years with my best friend and partner, I know in my heart that there's nobody better to lead this country. And that's the biggest thing I hope CNN's national audience will see tonight.
Thanks for tuning in,
Chirlane McCray

\------Original Message------
Friend,
This could be a huge moment for our campaign.
This Sunday, at 7:00 p.m. ET, Bill will participate in a live, hour-long town hall on CNN. Opportunities like this to directly reach a national audience don't come up often.
In order to turn curious viewers into real supporters, we need to be prepared to reach everyone who watches the town hall everywhere we can, as soon after the event ends as we can. That's going to take resources.
**[Make sure this campaign has the resources to turn viewers of Bill's CNN town hall this Sunday night into supporters. Contribute $1 today.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ee8/1630b3eb/51702b79/5f54bfd6/3439848498/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=711_org_em_fr")**
The more voters get to know Bill and his proven record of fighting for working people, the more they're likely to join us in supporting him. Let's make sure we make the most of this moment.
Thanks for stepping up today,
Team de Blasio
P.S. Don't forget to gather your friends and family to tune in this Sunday at 7:00 p.m. ET on CNN!

[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21ee8/1630b3eb/51702b79/5f54bfd6/3439848498/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=711_org_em_fr")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac1c/134673f2/c2099e3/69964781/203883198/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081819_AC_LD&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

subject: fwd: competition?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPjTsnEP88g-ZHfPzBEWLo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=1) Friend — did you see this email? We just got out of our weekly Sunday planning meeting and our finance team is telling us that if we face even _one more_ competitor, we’re going to _**need to**_ _**double**_ the amount of money we’ll need for this race. Bill and the team have been blitzing early primary states with great success, and if we want to keep up the momentum when other folks enter the race, we need to be prepared. [**Can you pitch in $20.20 right now to help us keep the momentum going?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPjTsnEP88g-ZHfPzBEWLo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=2) — Team Weld | | [KEEP THE MOMENTUM ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPjTsnEP88g-ZHfPzBEWLo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=3)
---
\---- Forwarded message ----
**From** : Team Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : August 22, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPjTsnEP88g-ZHfPzBEWLo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=4)
Friend, we’ll be quick. Rumors are swirling that a couple of folks are getting ready to jump into the race to challenge Donald Trump in the primary.
We welcome more competition against Donald Trump. The interest in challenging Trump confirms what we’ve known for a long time. **Donald Trump must not be re-elected.**
_We didn’t get in this race because it would be easy, we got into this race because Donald Trump is destroying the Republican Party and our country._
We believe we have the experience, knowledge, and message to unite our divided country, to restore dignity to the presidency, and to bring the Republican Party back to its roots.
[**Can you get us one step closer to winning the nomination and uniting our country by chipping in a $20.20 grassroots contribution today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPjTsnEP88g-ZHfPzBEWLo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=5)
Every dollar of every contribution goes towards critical voter outreach efforts to help us reach voters in the states we need to win if we want the nomination.
Thanks for standing with us,
Team Weld
| [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPjTsnEP88g-ZHfPzBEWLo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=6)

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=8) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190825_fr_1&n=9).

name: Cory Booker
subject: The dynamic of this race is changing quickly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I have to just state the obvious: We send you emails asking for money a lot -- especially around a monthly budget deadline. You deserve to know why this particular deadline is important for our campaign. August is historically a hard month for grassroots fundraising among Democrats. When we fell short of our mid-month goal, that raised the pressure on our ability to hit our marks before the month ended. [_**Can you chip in $1 right now to help us get back on track to hit our $450,000 goal?**_](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190825-em1-ndnr?refcode=em_fr_20190825_CB_20190825-fr-CB-eom3-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I know we're an underdog in this race right now and that others have a big leg up on fundraising -- that's fine. We don't need to match them dollar for dollar, but we can't afford to fall behind. Not now. The dynamics of this race are changing every single day -- in the last week, this crowded field got a little smaller. Next month, Americans will tune in to see a lot fewer people on the debate stage, and I'm excited to be one of the people you'll see. For a campaign like ours to keep gaining traction and build on the momentum we've seen this summer, we're counting on people like you. [_**The best way you can help right now is by making sure we hit our August fundraising goal -- chip in $1 today.**_](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190825-em1-ndnr?refcode=em_fr_20190825_CB_20190825-fr-CB-eom3-ndnr_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190825-em1-ndnr?refcode=em_fr_20190825_CB_20190825-fr-CB-eom3-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b76/5fca0d19/7064875d/29197ea2/2712586355/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b76/5fca0d19/7064875d/29197ea1/2712586355/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b76/5fca0d19/7064875d/29197ea0/2712586355/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b76/5fca0d19/7064875d/29197eaf/2712586355/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b76/5fca0d19/7064875d/29197ea3/2712586355/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
